content: Verify HF Inference availability for Gemma multimodal (Featherless flaky)
Create HF Gemma analyzer path (opt-in via env flag, ready for user's fine-tune)
Wire provider dispatch in /analyze (keep Gemini default until Gemma fine-tune lands)
Create FashionCLIP embedding service + persist embeddings on closet create
Add native camera capture on AddItem page (mobile-first)
Run testing agent on new /closet/search + Gemma dispatch + camera UI
Update plan.md with Phase A milestone
